jobs.title: Frontend JavaScript / Vue Engineer (Mid–Senior) – Ciberdefensa | Barcelona (Híbrido)
jobs.rawDescription: Desde BEIGAR buscamos Frontend JavaScript / Vue Engineers para incorporarse a una multinacional tecnológica dentro del área de ciberdefensa. Aumente sus posibilidades de conseguir una entrevista leyendo la siguiente descripción general de este puesto antes de presentar su candidatura. Trabajarás en equipos multidisciplinares dentro de proyectos tecnológicos de alto impacto, con arquitectura frontend sólida, entornos ágiles y un fuerte foco en calidad, escalabilidad y buenas prácticas de ingeniería. Este proceso está abierto a distintos niveles de experiencia dentro del desarrollo frontend con JavaScript y Vue.js, con posibilidad de encaje tanto en perfiles mid-level como senior dentro de distintos proyectos del mismo equipo. Responsabilidades - Desarrollo de componentes reutilizables con JavaScript (ES6+) y Vue.js - Diseño e implementación de interfaces modernas y responsive (HTML5, CSS3, SASS, BEM) - Integración con APIs REST - Participación activa en revisiones de código (Git: branches, pull requests) - Colaboración en equipos ágiles (Scrum / Kanban) - Mantenimiento, evolución y refactorización del código existente - Mejora continua de rendimiento, calidad y experiencia de usuario Requisitos - Experiencia en desarrollo frontend (aprox. 3–6+ años según nivel) - Sólidos conocimientos de JavaScript (ES6+) - Experiencia con Vue.js en proyectos reales - HTML5, CSS3, SASS y metodología BEM - Integración con APIs REST - Experiencia trabajando con Git en entornos colaborativos - Experiencia en equipos ágiles (Scrum / Kanban) - Nivel de inglés mínimo B2 (deseable) Se valorará - Experiencia con TypeScript - Testing frontend (Jest, Karma, Jasmine) - Herramientas de calidad como ESLint o SonarQube - Experiencia con Vite o Webpack - Conocimientos de librerías de mapas (Leaflet, OpenLayers, Google Maps) - Experiencia con React o Angular - Nociones de Docker y entornos de despliegue - Uso de herramientas de diseño (Figma) - Experiencia en design systems o librerías de componente

score.reason: Perfect stack alignment: Vue primary + TypeScript + Figma + testing. Senior-level architecture and design-systems focus. Spain-based remote with no technical gaps.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Strong fit. Vue is the primary framework with all core frontend requirements aligned (JavaScript, CSS/Sass, testing, Git). Senior-level role in remote Europe with Spain explicitly listed. Bonus skills (TypeScript, multilingual) are aligned.

jobs.title: Frontend Vue.js Engineer Senior
jobs.rawDescription: En Indra Group, protegemos lo que más importa. Lideramos el desarrollo de soluciones tecnológicas punteras que refuerzan la seguridad nacional e internacional. Por favor, lea detenidamente la siguiente descripción del puesto para asegurarse de que encaja con el perfil antes de enviar su solicitud. Desarrollador/a Frontend Vue.js Senior En Indra buscamos incorporar un/a Frontend Vue.js Engineer Senior para formar parte de proyectos innovadores, desarrollando aplicaciones web modernas, escalables y orientadas a componentes. ¿Cuál será tu misión? Formarás parte de un equipo ágil multidisciplinar, participando en el diseño, desarrollo y evolución de soluciones frontend de alto impacto. Funciones principales: • Desarrollo de aplicaciones web con JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 y Vue.js • Construcción y mantenimiento de librerías de componentes reutilizables bajo el paradigma Atomic Design • Integración con APIs REST y GraphQL • Aplicación de buenas prácticas de desarrollo y control de versiones (Git – Gitflow) • Implementación de testing unitario (Jest, Karma, Jasmine) • Trabajo en entornos ágiles (Scrum / Kanban) Requisitos • Experiencia mínima de 3 años en desarrollo frontend • Al menos 2 años trabajando con Vue.js • Conocimientos sólidos en: • JavaScript ES6+ • HTML5 y CSS3 • SASS y metodología BEM • Gestión de código con Git • Experiencia en testing y buenas prácticas de calidad de código • Capacidad analítica, proactividad y trabajo en equipo Se valorará • Titulación en Ingeniería Informática o similar • Experiencia con: • Librerías de mapas (Google Maps, OpenLayers, Leaflet) • Otros frameworks (React, Angular) • Herramientas de calidad (ESLint, SonarQube) • Bundlers (Webpack, Vite) • TypeScript • Docker (nivel básico) • Nivel de inglés B2 Lo que te ofrecemos • Estabilidad y Futuro : Proyectos a largo plazo en una empresa líder de Defensa con más de 50.000 profesionales, con seguridad financiera. • Proyectos Innovadores y de Alto Alcance : Trabajarás con tecnologías

score.reason: Strong fit for your Vue expertise: Spain-remote senior role from stable company (Indra, 50K+ staff). Core stack matches perfectly (Vue primary, JavaScript, testing).

jobs.title: Front End Developer (Vue.js) - fully remote within Europe (m/f/d)
jobs.rawDescription: The Team We’re a fully remote, globally distributed team driven by curiosity, humility, and a relentless commitment to growth. At our core, we believe that collaboration fuels innovation, and we’ve built a positive, inclusive culture where diverse perspectives are not only welcomed, but celebrated. You’ll be embraced by a tight-knit tech team that supports, challenges, and uplifts one another. From day one, you’ll feel part of something bigger. Your Role We're on the hunt for a Front-End Developer who’s passionate about crafting elegant, high-performance web applications that look as good as they feel. In this role, you'll take the lead in building fast, accessible, and SEO-optimized user experiences using Vue 3 and Nuxt 3. This is more than just code, your work will shape how users engage with our platform across the globe. You'll collaborate within a cross-functional team that thrives on agile processes, shared goals, and creative problem-solving. What You'll Be Doing • Build, enhance, and maintain modern front-end applications with Vue 3 and Nuxt 3 • Craft lightning-fast, accessible, and mobile-friendly UIs that exceed Core Web Vitals benchmarks • Leverage Server-Side Rendering (SSR) to maximize SEO and load speed • Integrate with REST APIs to create fluid and efficient data flows • Apply modern development practices, clean code, reusable components, testing, and robust documentation • Stay ahead of front-end trends and share insights with the team • Ensure consistency across browsers and devices with responsive design principles • Contribute to architectural decisions, peer reviews, and team-wide discussions What You'll Need • 5+ years of experience in modern front-end development • Mastery of HTML5 , CSS , and JavaScript (ES6+) • Deep knowledge of Vue.js (ideally Vue 3) and Nuxt.js • Strong understanding of SSR , performance tuning, and Core Web Vitals • Experience with TypeScript and scalable CSS architecture • A sharp eye for clean, user-friendly UI/UX design

score.reason: Vue 3 is primary and matches perfectly (Alfonso is expert), TypeScript aligns. However, role explicitly requires deep Nuxt 3 expertise, which is a significant gap—learnable but non-trivial. Perfect location and seniority (5+ required, 10+ available) are strong positives.

jobs.title: 🚀Senior Fullstack Developer (Vue/Node) IA - Copilot🚀 (100% remoto)
jobs.rawDescription: Buscamos un/a Fullstack Vue/Node con experiencia con IA (copilot) con sólida experiencia en el desarrollo de aplicaciones para trabajar en un conocido cliente del sector ecommerce. Posición 100% remota y estable ✅ Requisitos Experiencia de al menos 5 años en: • Desarrollo de aplicaciones con Vue, NodeJS, JavaScript, CSS y LESS, aplicando metodologías de estructuración como BEM. • Experiencia trabajando con herramientas de testing como Jest y Testing Library para asegurar la calidad del código. • Uso de GitHub Copilot y copilotos de desarrollo asistido por IA para la generación de código. • Experiencia en validación y revisión de código generado automáticamente por herramientas de inteligencia artificial. • Capacidad de trabajo en equipo y comunicación efectiva con clientes y equipos multidisciplinarios. 🛠️ Responsabilidades • Desarrollo IA First: Formar parte del equipo de proyecto de Knowmad mood en la creación de una nueva aplicación “IA First”, desarrollada mediante copilotos de GitHub Copilot • Validación de código asistido por IA: Revisar, validar y asegurar la calidad del código generado automáticamente por los copilotos. • Desarrollo adicional: Implementar funcionalidades adicionales y ajustes necesarios sobre el código generado, garantizando escalabilidad, mantenibilidad y buenas prácticas. • Testing y calidad: Diseñar e implementar pruebas automatizadas utilizando herramientas como Jest y Testing Library para asegurar la robustez de la aplicación. • Colaboración multidisciplinaria: Trabajar junto a otros equipos técnicos y de negocio para asegurar que la solución desarrollada responde a las necesidades del proyecto. Además, valoraremos muy positivamente si tienes experiencia y/o conocimientos en: • SSR (Server-Side Rendering). • Gestión de monorepositorios. • Experiencia con frameworks como Nuxt o similares. • Uso de contenedores con Docker. ¿Y nosotros qué ofrecemos? • Contrato indefinido 📄: Desde el primer día, con opción de 12 o 14 pagas • Modelo 100%

score.reason: Strong Vue + testing match, perfect location/timezone. Fullstack role requires 5+ years Node expertise, but AI-first Copilot development mitigates deep architecture knowledge requirements.

jobs.title: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bosnia, Bulgaria, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Serbia, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. As a Senior AI Engineer, you'll drive intelligent features that redefine how users build automations. You'll build AI-powered capabilities, from natural language input to smart suggestions, that make creating workflows faster and more intuitive. You'll collaborate across engineering, product, and design to bring generative AI and LLM-based enhancements into the core user experience. You'll improve existing AI integrations, develop new ones, and shape how AI powers our product. You’ll work across the entire AI feature lifecycle: Architect and implement AI-powered capabilities : code gen

score.reason: Sr AI Engineer centered on generative AI, LLM optimization, and prompt engineering—not UI development. Vue/TS are secondary to core AI focus. Alfonso is a Vue frontend specialist, not an AI/LLM engineer.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend developer Vue.js, 100% En remoto
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend developer Vue.js El rol: Formarás parte del equipo de frontend y tendrás un impacto directo en cómo los administradores IT interactúan con la plataforma. Tu responsabilidad principal será diseñar y construir interfaces web modernas, intuitivas y escalables, capaces de simplificar flujos de trabajo técnicos y complejos. No es un rol centrado únicamente en crear componentes, sino en pensar producto: Traducir necesidades reales de usuarios técnicos en experiencias claras y eficientes. Trabajar de forma muy cercana con Producto, UX y Backend en la definición de soluciones. Mejorar de forma continua la usabilidad, rendimiento y escalabilidad del frontend. Mantener altos estándares de calidad mediante buenas prácticas, revisiones de código y documentación. Investigar e incorporar tecnologías frontend modernas (APIs de navegador, nuevas soluciones de interacción, etc.). Mantener y evolucionar interfaces existentes, asegurando una experiencia sólida y consistente. Frontend Engineer Producto SaaS (IT / Device Management) ¿Tienes experiencia con Vue.js (versión 3)? Buscamos un perfil hands-on, con mentalidad de producto y gusto por el código bien hecho: Experiencia sólida desarrollando aplicaciones web con Vue.js (preferiblemente Vue 3) y Tailwind CSS. Buen dominio de TypeScript, JavaScript moderno (ES6+), estándares web y patrones de diseño. Experiencia trabajando con APIs web y entendiendo cómo interactúan frontend y backend. Buenas prácticas de desarrollo: clean code, testing, revisiones y control de versiones (Git). Capacidad para desenvolverse en un entorno internacional, con nivel alto de inglés. Experiencia trabajando en entornos Agile y equipos multidisciplinares. Valorable: Experiencia con Electron o aplicaciones de escritorio. Conocimientos de Socket.io, consumo de APIs (REST, OpenAPI). Familiaridad con cloud y despliegues (AWS, GCloud, Docker, CI/CD). Conocimientos de seguridad web (OWASP) y ecosistemas multiplataforma (iOS, Android, macOS, Windows)

score.reason: Perfect match for core expertise (Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind). Remote Spain-based senior product role with product-first mindset aligns exactly with profile and timezone.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer / Backend & Frontend - Bootstrapped SaaS Startup (m/w/d) remote in EU
jobs.rawDescription: DatAds is redefining how marketing and creative teams build winning ads. Our SaaS platform bridges the gap between performance marketers and creative teams by delivering visual ad insights, automated analytics, and AI-powered creative recommendations. The result: faster workflows, smarter decisions, and more high-performing ads – across Meta, TikTok, and YouTube. We’re growing fast, with double-digit month-over-month expansion. Our customers include some of the most innovative eCommerce brands, lead generation companies, and performance marketing agencies across the DACH region – and increasingly, across Europe. Brands like yfood, Greator, Perspective, and Holy trust DatAds to power their creative strategy. If you want to be part of a fast-moving marketing tech startup where your ideas actually shape the product – join us. We're building something big, and we’re just getting started. Tasks Feature Development & Extension across product lines (analytics, inspiration, ai). Possible projects can include Build & maintain integrations to ad-platforms like Taboola, Pinterest or Snapchat Implement AI recommendation system Extend static AI workflows to dynamic AI agent Internal Tech Support: Communication with the internal Customer Success team (in English) when bugs or technical questions arise. End-to-End System Ownership: From system design to deployment, to tech support you'll own entire technology solutions and ensure their operational excellence. We believe in giving maximum freedom – you get the problem, you architect, build and own the complete system solution. Requirements Backend: PostgreSQL / SQL REST APIs Ideally Node.js + Express.js + TypeScript Most features involve API updates Cloud (Azure preferred) Experience with Docker & serverless containers (Azure Container Apps, Cloud Run) Event-driven architectures and queue-based background jobs Frontend : Nuxt.js / Vue.js or Next.js / React TailwindCSS Ability to implement clean UI components using mo

Alfonso's basic Node.js knowledge and absence of backend stack experience—despite seniority and location fit—make this a poor fit.

jobs.title: Fullstack Developer
jobs.rawDescription: Fullstack Developer – Rakennetaan yhdessä maailmanluokan työkalu maanrakentajille Ketä haemme? Etsimme itsenäistä ja motivoitunutta fullstack-kehittäjää, joka haluaa rakentaa jotain merkittävää. Liityt tiimiin varhaisessa vaiheessa – se tarkoittaa, että päätöksilläsi on oikeasti merkitystä. Haemme kehittäjää, joka: ottaa omistajuutta tuotteesta ajattelee käyttäjän ongelmaa, ei vain teknistä toteutusta haluaa rakentaa pitkäjänteisesti toimialan parasta ohjelmistoa Vaatimukset Itseohjautuvuus. Kokemus AI-pohjaisten ominaisuuksien kehittämisestä. Tekniset vaatimukset: PHP 8.x ja Laravel-framework MySQL Vue.js tai vastaava moderni JS-framework REST API -kehitys ja integraatiot Eduksi katsotaan: Docker ja konttiympäristöt CI/CD-putket Tuntemus SaaS- tai multi-tenancy-arkkitehtuurista Testauksen kokemus Mitä rakennamme Rakennamme järjestelmää, joka ohjaa päivittäin miljoonien eurojen työmaita ja liiketoimintaa. Maanrakennusala pyörittää miljardien liiketoimintaa, mutta toimialan yrityksillä on ollut tarjolla vain yleistyökaluja – ei heidän arkeensa rakennettua ohjelmistoa. Me ratkaisemme sen. Olemme pieni ja tehokas tiimi, joka rakentaa palvelua ketterästi ja yhdessä. Tavoitteenamme on olla organisaatio, jossa AI on luonteva osa kaikkia prosessejamme ja tuotekehitystämme. Uskomme, että yhdistämällä ihmisten osaamisen ja tekoälyn mahdollisuudet voimme tehdä arjesta entistä sujuvampaa ja tuottavampaa. Meillä on maksavat asiakkaat, terveet luvut ja kasvava asiakaskanta. Rakennamme nyt seuraavaa kasvuvaihetta. Mitä tarjoamme Rooli, jossa pääset rakentamaa, ei vain ylläpitämään Etä- tai hybridityö – sinä valitset Pieni tiimi, matala hierarkia, suora vaikutus Mahdollisuus kasvaa tuotteen ja yrityksen mukana Palkka: 4 000 – 6 000€/kk Hakemukset sähköpostilla osoitteeseen olli-pekka@maatop.fi Location: Remote · FI

score.reason: Vue expert but missing core PHP/Laravel backend skills required for fullstack role. Finnish startup with mid-level expectations, AI-focused product, and language barrier.

needsReview.title: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural lang
needsReview.company: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed d
needsReview.location: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural language, offering insights to SMBs they couldn't get before. We're fully funded by our sibling company, and are looking for remote freelancers in the US and full-time, onsite employees in San Diego, California (if you're into that kind of thing). We're looking for experience in the following roles: + QA: We're looking for a QA engineer deeply familiar with the software lifecycle in the age of agentic coding. You'd have a lot of responsibility, but also the opportunity to define what solid QA looks like at Ontix. + Azure Cloud Engineer: We're a mostly-AWS shop, but we have a few potential customers that are deeply entrenched in the Azure ecosystem, including a migration from SharePoint to Fabric + OneLake. You'd be leading the charge on that. + Infosec + Automated Vulnerability Scanning: If you browse new CVEs over breakfast, we want to talk to you. There's a huge demand among our current customers for continuous vulnerability scanning, both in the codebase and on the deployed edge. We have some test platforms, but would love a more robust solution we can market. + Full-Stack WordPress Developer: Our sister company is a bit old school still: If you can parachute in to a PHP + Vue 2/3 + WordPress + AWS EC2 environment, we would love to pass on your number to them. We're looking to grow quickly as our client base expands. Healthcare, vision, and 401(k) for FTEs. If you're interested in any of these roles, or would like more information in general about us, please visit https://ontix.io or email l33t@ontix.io with a few sentences describing your experience, interest, and where you're located.

needsReview.title: Software Development Engineer Backend
needsReview.rawDescription: About HighLevel: HighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes. To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently. Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability. Our people With over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide.
